hypothesis: Increasing the DPO KL-penalty parameter β from 0.5 to 1.5 while reducing LoRA adapter rank from 8 to 2 during preference-tuning of OLMo will reduce token-level KL divergence on element/composition tokens and produce a statistically significant increase in mean Thermo-Calc-derived reward and satisfaction rates for the four synthesis objectives compared to the original OLMo-DPO configuration.
